props.ChoiceText: In the confusion of battle, your action seized something large enough to improve your standing and enlarge expectations.
props.ChoiceBio: Capturing colors or guns taught you that visible success wins admiration quickly and leaves no room to be ordinary afterward.

0.TransitionText: Because capturing colors or guns made victory visible in your own hands, success only enlarged the command laid upon you.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because capturing colors or guns made victory visible in your own hands, glory and martial distinction pushed you toward knighthood.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because capturing colors or guns made victory visible in your own hands, bold action and battlefield precision drew you toward the musketeer's trade.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
